name: Milton Keynes Grid Supply Point
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Milton Keynes GSP
comments: Upstream feed point for the M1-A corridor. Energised and in service ahead of Section RA-001 works.

name: Newport Pagnell Substation
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Newport Pagnell Substation
comments: Existing substation, refurbished switchgear commissioned on schedule.

name: Northampton Substation
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Northampton Substation
comments: Mid-corridor tie-in right at the Rugby-Coventry Spur junction. Switchgear hall structure complete, busbar installation in progress.

name: Kettering Substation
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Kettering Substation
comments: Site compound established. Existing switchgear bay being prepared for tie-in works.

name: Daventry Switching Station
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Daventry Switching Station
comments: Protection testing in progress ahead of switching schedule with the DNO.

name: Rugby Switching Station
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Rugby Switching Station
comments: The Rugby-Coventry Spur has reached the site; tie-in works underway alongside Section RB-006.

name: Coventry Converter Station
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Coventry Converter Station
comments: Terminus of the Rugby-Coventry Spur. The spur has now reached this site; access track and compound establishment underway ahead of tie-in.

name: Leicester Grid Supply Point
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Leicester GSP
comments: Final tie-in point for the M1-A corridor. Construction has not yet reached this site (Section RA-015 not started).

name: Bedford Substation
wbsPath: Grid Upgrade > Power Stations > Bedford Substation
comments: Existing regional substation, unaffected by current works, shown for network context.
